title: Assistant Store Manager - Marks & Spencer India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Marks & Spencer India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
